_comment_redeem_alias: Use 'redeem' instead of 'effect' to make a chat command fire the same flow a real channel-point redemption would. The value must EXACTLY match the rewardTitle key in redeems.json (case, spaces, exclamation marks all count).
_comment_random_sound: sound:'*' picks any uploaded sound from assets/sounds/. sound:['a.wav','b.wav'] picks from that exact list. Pair with effect:'play-sound' to skip the visual entirely (useful for soundboards / 'out of context' style commands).
_comment: Add more chat commands here. Key = the exact command starting with !.
